title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 -  19 -  2018: Google Earthing Boulder Country Roads

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a vlog update from his Boulder apartment explaining his current Google Earth project: he is tracing and converting road lines in Boulder County into polygons to build a simplified 'cartoon world' map, and plans to do the same for ancient Latium (kingdom of Rome) so he can compare the two geographies.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: polygon vs line tool in Google Earth
stances.position: polygons are better for roads because you can see distance and visibility from far away

image backgrounds show terrain contours but roads render poorly over them; solid polygon layers render roads uniformly but lack contour — prefers to work around it by filling the area with trail/landmark objects
Latium is a lot more boring than Boulder County, which is amazing with its mountain roads

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I found out the light flickered off in my last video because the connection was lost, not because the bulb died.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I fixed the light by pushing it in and wiggling it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm careful to prevent water from getting near the light connection.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to make a video to talk about what I'm doing now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last time, I tried to create sister city states with Latium (a kingdom of Rome), Boulder County, and the city side.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't match all the city states because I started tracing lines and noticed bright reds in Boulder County.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I initially used the line tool to measure distances but later realized the polygon tool could do the same.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to convert all the roads in Boulder County to make them better, similar to Denver.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I created a cartoon world in Boulder County and the kingdom of Rome, then expanded it further.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I already have most of the cities and locations in Colorado to match Italy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I was deciding how to cover all of Boulder County in the cartoon world.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want the cartoon world to be consistent, with only the conduit being different.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I blocked out all houses and roads, only keeping the roads that matter for bikers or runners.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The roads are color-coded, with dirt roads included.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I simplified the world to focus on essential elements.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I debated using an image background or a polygon layer for the cartoon world.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Using an image background shows land contours but obscures roads.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A polygon layer makes roads uniform but lacks contour visibility.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to cover Boulder County with a web of trails and houses to show contours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have enough data to include trails, houses, and mountain tops.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I started working late last night and continued today, converting lines for roads.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might be saving my work in another place to avoid losing progress.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Converting all the roads is a big step toward finishing the project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I already have most of the cities and some resorts mapped out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's an expansion being built at a ski resort, and I have it mapped.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I also mapped Owens Park and other locations outside the main area.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After finishing Boulder County, I plan to do the same for Latium.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to ensure Latium's roads match real roads before creating connections.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Latium is less interesting than Boulder County because of its lack of mountains.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm spacing out and not fully focused while working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm looking forward to finishing the project and comparing Rome and Boulder County.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The comparison will help me understand the big picture.
